---
title: "Learning Paths"
author:
  - name: Peter Reiter
date: "2025-11-27"
date-modified: now
lang: en
order: -1
listing:
  id: learning-paths
  sort-ui: true
  sort:
    - "order"
    - "date"
    - "title desc"
  contents:
    - "/*/*.qmd"
---

## Learning Paths

Learning paths organize course materials into a recommended sequence of learning units.

They help you move step by step from foundational ideas to more advanced applications, so you always know what to study next.

Use the paths to plan your weekly learning, prepare for class sessions, and review before assessments.

### How to use this section

- Start with the first unit of a path unless your instructor indicates otherwise.
- Follow units in order, because later units often build on earlier ones.
- Use each unit's activities and resources for preparation, practice, and revision.

:::{#learning-paths}
:::
